overall.description: Nighttime drive along a foggy desert highway approaching the neon-lit skyline of Night City. The camera moves steadily past rocky cliffs and sparse desert vegetation while vehicles occasionally pass by. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring atmospheric haze and dramatic artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert mountain highway with rocky cliff

events.description: dark sedan passes quickly on the left side of the road
road curves gently to the right around the rocky cliff

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the right side of the desert highway, maintaining consistent speed

notable_agents.action: sedan overtaking and passing by on the left at high speed

entered.detail: large rocky mountain cliff face lining the left side of the highway
two-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines and white edge markings
metal guardrail separating the road from the rocky cliff drop
tall utility pole with overhead street light illuminating the road
foggy silhouette of neon-lit skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy desert highway at night, with a massive rocky cliff dominating the left side. The camera moves forward along the asphalt road as a sedan overtakes on the left. Street lights cast pools of light on the pavement while the distant neon glow of a cyberpunk city skyline is barely visible through the haze ahead.

events.description: large illuminated billboard becomes visible in the distance ahead
vehicle with headlights passes in the opposite direction on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway as the road straightens, approaching the billboard

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with bright white illumination and red text visible ahead
distinctive desert yucca tree silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: As the road curves past the initial cliff, the terrain opens up to reveal a large illuminated billboard ahead. The rocky cliff face now appears on the right side of the road. Joshua trees dot the desert landscape on the left while the camera continues its steady approach toward the city skyline in the distance.

events.description: military armored vehicle passes on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed while approaching the illuminated billboard, military vehicle passes

notable_agents.action: tan-colored military armored personnel carrier driving past on the left

segments.scene_description: The final stretch shows the camera drawing closer to the large illuminated billboard, with the rocky cliff still lining the right side. A distinctive military armored vehicle passes by on the left, adding variety to the sparse traffic. The neon-lit city skyline remains prominent in the foggy distance as the journey continues along the desert highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a foggy desert highway at night that gradually draws closer to a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline. It begins with a massive rocky cliff dominating the left side of the road as a sedan overtakes the camera under the glow of scattered street lights. As the road curves, the terrain shifts to place the cliff face on the right while Joshua trees appear on the left, opening the view toward a large illuminated billboard ahead. The scene then progresses as the camera approaches the billboard, passing a military armored vehicle on the left. Finally, the journey continues along the asphalt toward the prominent, hazy glow of the city skyline in the distance.
